name: Iranian Dinner 3
overview: Synopsis: In this program, actors and well-known figures in groups of four invite their friends to their homes for dinner and a friendly gathering. The host tries to surprise his guests by performing a special program or inviting another guest. At the end of each night, guests give points to their host for dinner and reception. At the end of four nights, one person will be chosen as the best host...

trailers.title: Sham 2 - Teaser | شام ایرانی 2 - تیزر: آنچه در خانه جورج خواهید دید
